mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_short_sample_stats_v3 ( stock_code, trade_date, buy_fill_rate, buy_3pct_fill_rate, buy_2pct_fill_rate, buy_1pct_fill_rate, not_filled_rate, take_profit_1pct_rate, take_profit_2pct_rate, take_profit_3pct_rate, force_sell_rate, avg_net_return_bps, avg_gross_return_bps, avg_take_profit_return_bps, avg_force_sell_return_bps, max_loss_bps, buy_3pct_avg_net_return_bps, buy_2pct_avg_net_return_bps, buy_1pct_avg_net_return_bps, post_buy_drawdown_avg, force_sell_loss_rate, raw_win_rate, adjusted_win_rate, sample_count, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.stockCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.buyFillRate}, #{item.buy3PctFillRate}, #{item.buy2PctFillRate}, #{item.buy1PctFillRate}, #{item.notFilledRate}, #{item.takeProfit1PctRate}, #{item.takeProfit2PctRate}, #{item.takeProfit3PctRate}, #{item.forceSellRate}, #{item.avgNetReturnBps}, #{item.avgGrossReturnBps}, #{item.avgTakeProfitReturnBps}, #{item.avgForceSellReturnBps}, #{item.maxLossBps}, #{item.buy3PctAvgNetReturnBps}, #{item.buy2PctAvgNetReturnBps}, #{item.buy1PctAvgNetReturnBps}, #{item.postBuyDrawdownAvg}, #{item.forceSellLossRate}, #{item.rawWinRate}, #{item.adjustedWinRate}, #{item.sampleCount}, #{item.createdAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE buy_fill_rate = VALUES(buy_fill_rate), buy_3pct_fill_rate = VALUES(buy_3pct_fill_rate), buy_2pct_fill_rate = VALUES(buy_2pct_fill_rate), buy_1pct_fill_rate = VALUES(buy_1pct_fill_rate), not_filled_rate = VALUES(not_filled_rate), take_profit_1pct_rate = VALUES(take_profit_1pct_rate), take_profit_2pct_rate = VALUES(take_profit_2pct_rate), take_profit_3pct_rate = VALUES(take_profit_3pct_rate), force_sell_rate = VALUES(force_sell_rate), avg_net_return_bps = VALUES(avg_net_return_bps), avg_gross_return_bps = VALUES(avg_gross_return_bps), avg_take_profit_return_bps = VALUES(avg_take_profit_return_bps), avg_force_sell_return_bps = VALUES(avg_force_sell_return_bps), max_loss_bps = VALUES(max_loss_bps), buy_3pct_avg_net_return_bps = VALUES(buy_3pct_avg_net_return_bps), buy_2pct_avg_net_return_bps = VALUES(buy_2pct_avg_net_return_bps), buy_1pct_avg_net_return_bps = VALUES(buy_1pct_avg_net_return_bps), post_buy_drawdown_avg = VALUES(post_buy_drawdown_avg), force_sell_loss_rate = VALUES(force_sell_loss_rate), raw_win_rate = VALUES(raw_win_rate), adjusted_win_rate = VALUES(adjusted_win_rate), sample_count = VALUES(sample_count)
